requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: UAE public and fleet charging deployments commonly follow the IEC 62196 ecosystem: Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2, also known as IEC 62196-3 configuration FF, for DC fast charging where specified by the network or vehicle population. IEC 62196 connector conformity is a technical interoperability requirement and becomes mandatory when written into utility, network, tender, landlord, or project specifications.
summary.zh: 阿联酋公共及车队充电部署通常采用IEC 62196体系：交流充电使用Type 2，直流快充在网络或车辆体系要求时使用CCS2，即IEC 62196-3 FF配置。IEC 62196接口符合性属于技术互操作要求；当其写入公用事业、网络、招标、业主或项目规范时，即成为项目强制要求。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋公共及車隊充電部署通常採用IEC 62196體系：交流充電使用Type 2，直流快充在網絡或車輛體系要求時使用CCS2，即IEC 62196-3 FF配置。IEC 62196接口符合性屬於技術互操作要求；當其寫入公用事業、網絡、招標、業主或項目規範時，即成為項目強制要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 charging modes and control functions

summary.en: China AC and DC chargers commonly use GB/T 20234.2 and GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and DC couplers are physically and electrically different from IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2, and GB/T DC charging commonly relies on GB/T 27930 communication rather than the IEC / CCS communication stack required by CCS2 deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流和直流充电桩通常采用GB/T 20234.2和GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流及直流耦合器在物理和电气上均不同于IEC 62196 Type 2和CCS2，且GB/T直流充电通常依赖GB/T 27930通信，而不是CCS2部署所需的IEC / CCS通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流和直流充電樁通常採用GB/T 20234.2和GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流及直流耦合器在物理和電氣上均不同於IEC 62196 Type 2和CCS2，且GB/T直流充電通常依賴GB/T 27930通訊，而不是CCS2部署所需的IEC / CCS通訊棧。

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Type 2 / CCS2 UAE deployments. Redesign may affect the coupler, cable assembly, locking, proximity and control pilot handling, DC communication, labels, test reports, temperature rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for project-approved connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩并不能直接适用于阿联酋Type 2 / CCS2部署。重新设计可能影响耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、接近及控制导引处理、直流通信、标签、测试报告、温升证据和备件策略。不应将转接器视为项目认可接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁並不能直接適用於阿聯酋Type 2 / CCS2部署。重新設計可能影響耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、接近及控制導引處理、直流通訊、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據和備件策略。不應將轉接器視為項目認可接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by network, utility, tender, vehicle fleet, or installation specification; otherwise a market-interoperability requirement rather than a standalone national legal rule
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not a Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is usually a hardware and protocol redesign, not paperwork. Confirm whether the UAE deployment requires IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before quoting, labelling, or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换通常是硬件和协议重新设计，而不是文件替换。在报价、贴标或发货前，应确认阿联酋部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換通常是硬體和協議重新設計，而不是文件替換。在報價、貼標或發貨前，應確認阿聯酋部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。

requirement_topic.en: DEWA EV Green Charger Initiative and Grid Connection
requirement_topic.zh: DEWA EV Green Charger计划及并网接入
requirement_topic.zht: DEWA EV Green Charger計劃及併網接入

summary.en: In Dubai, DEWA operates the EV Green Charger initiative and controls electricity connection requirements for charger installations connected to the Dubai grid. DEWA has migrated charger equipment eligibility handling to the Hab Reeh online portal, so older static PDF eligibility-list references should be treated as deprecated. A charger that is technically compliant with IEC standards still needs project-level acceptance for supply capacity, metering, load management, civil and electrical installation, commissioning, and any network-operation requirements imposed by DEWA or the site owner.
summary.zh: 在迪拜，DEWA运营EV Green Charger计划，并管理接入迪拜电网的充电设施用电连接要求。DEWA已将充电设备资格处理迁移至Hab Reeh在线门户，因此旧版静态PDF资格清单引用应视为已弃用。即使充电桩在技术上符合IEC标准，仍需在项目层面取得对供电容量、计量、负载管理、土建及电气安装、调试，以及DEWA或场地方提出的网络运营要求的认可。
summary.zht: 在迪拜，DEWA運營EV Green Charger計劃，並管理接入迪拜電網的充電設施用電連接要求。DEWA已將充電設備資格處理遷移至Hab Reeh線上門戶，因此舊版靜態PDF資格清單引用應視為已棄用。即使充電樁在技術上符合IEC標準，仍需在項目層面取得對供電容量、計量、負載管理、土建及電氣安裝、調試，以及DEWA或場地方提出的網絡運營要求的認可。

standards_or_laws: DEWA EV Green Charger initiative requirements
DEWA Hab Reeh online portal for charger equipment eligibility
DEWA electricity connection and installation approval requirements

summary.en: China domestic acceptance commonly relies on GB/T 18487 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 communication for DC systems, and local grid or project acceptance. These records do not replace DEWA grid-connection review, Dubai installation acceptance, or a UAE network operator's commissioning process.
summary.zh: 中国国内验收通常依据GB/T 18487设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930通信，以及当地电网或项目验收。这些记录不能替代DEWA并网审查、迪拜安装验收或阿联酋充电网络运营方的调试流程。
summary.zht: 中國國內驗收通常依據GB/T 18487設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930通訊，以及當地電網或項目驗收。這些記錄不能替代DEWA併網審查、迪拜安裝驗收或阿聯酋充電網絡運營方的調試流程。

gap.en: Prepare Hab Reeh portal evidence where DEWA equipment eligibility is required, plus single-line diagrams, load calculations, charger nameplate ratings, harmonic and EMC data, protection coordination, earthing details, metering requirements, network communication details, commissioning method statements, and local installer documentation. UAE grid acceptance is site-specific and cannot be proven solely by factory product certification or an old static PDF list.
gap.zh: 在DEWA要求设备资格时，应准备Hab Reeh门户证据，并准备单线图、负荷计算、充电桩铭牌额定值、谐波及EMC数据、保护配合、接地细节、计量要求、网络通信细节、调试方法说明和当地安装商文件。阿联酋并网验收具有现场特定性，不能仅凭工厂产品认证或旧版静态PDF清单证明。
gap.zht: 在DEWA要求設備資格時，應準備Hab Reeh門戶證據，並準備單線圖、負荷計算、充電樁銘牌額定值、諧波及EMC數據、保護配合、接地細節、計量要求、網絡通訊細節、調試方法說明和當地安裝商文件。阿聯酋併網驗收具有現場特定性，不能僅憑工廠產品認證或舊版靜態PDF清單證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Dubai grid-connected installations where DEWA connection, metering, installation, Hab Reeh equipment eligibility, or EV Green Charger participation requirements apply; other emirates require their relevant utility approval route
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid or project acceptance applies domestically and is not a DEWA approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A UAE-ready charger package needs both product evidence and site/grid evidence. For Dubai projects, use DEWA's Hab Reeh online portal for equipment eligibility where required and treat older static PDF eligibility-list references as deprecated.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向阿联酋的充电桩资料包需要同时覆盖产品证据和现场/电网证据。对于迪拜项目，应在要求时使用DEWA的Hab Reeh在线门户处理设备资格，并将旧版静态PDF资格清单引用视为已弃用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向阿聯酋的充電樁資料包需要同時覆蓋產品證據和現場/電網證據。對於迪拜項目，應在要求時使用DEWA的Hab Reeh線上門戶處理設備資格，並將舊版靜態PDF資格清單引用視為已棄用。
